title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
